original_image_tags: The page shows the reverse side of a typewritten document. The main body text from the other side is visible through the thin paper, but is largely illegible and reversed. Several official stamps are applied to this side.
A rectangular pink/reddish ink stamp with text oriented vertically.

elements.description: Page appears to be the back of a document. A faint red rectangular stamp in the lower right reads 'MAILED 30'. Near the bottom center, an upside-down blue ink stamp reads 'RECEIVED MAIL RM U.S. DEPT OF JUSTICE FBI Aug 11 6 10 PM '52'. A faint red upside-down stamp near the top right reads 'RECORDED-80'.

judge.reason: Description B quotes specific, detailed stamp text that Description A does not mention at all, indicating a clear contradiction where one side sees detailed content the other side does not.
